response_text: Idra taps the convoy board to isolate the telemetry anomaly, then states, "The hold remains narrow until the vessel's provenance reconciles with the corridor law; any contact before verified status is a liability we will not authorize."

failure_notes: Still denied contact before verified status and misspelled Isdra as Idra.
pipeline_lessons: Critical proper nouns and required compromise meanings need explicit constraints when small models drift.
